title: galium saxatile var. hercynicum
intro: Galium saxatile var. hercynicum, also known as the herb bane, is a variety of the Galium saxatile plant, a type of flowering plant native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Galium saxatile var. hercynicum include relief from digestive problems, menstrual cramps, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a tincture or dried herb in teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used topically in creams and salves to treat skin irritations and wounds.
